hero.kicker: Megan Graham for Elkhart County Clerk
hero.headline: Professional Systems. Clear Records. Public Trust.
hero.lead: A practical plan to bring professional systems, reliable records, and transparent elections back to the Elkhart County Clerk’s Office.

whyRaceMatters.label: Why This Race Matters
whyRaceMatters.title: The Clerk’s Office affects daily life in Elkhart County.
whyRaceMatters.body: The office handles elections, court records, filings, and public documents that residents, businesses, attorneys, and families rely on every day. When systems work well, government feels reliable. When they do not, people feel the consequences.
whyRaceMatters.body2: Elkhart County deserves a Clerk’s Office that runs with strong systems, professional standards, and clear accountability.

priorities.title: Secure Elections
priorities.body: Strengthen election procedures and transparency so voters can trust the process.

priorities.title: Reliable Records
priorities.body: Improve organization, workflow, and access to the records residents rely on.

priorities.title: Professional Service
priorities.body: Run the office with stronger systems, clear procedures, and better citizen service.
